case_title: MUSA M DIRBAS VS. F. J. CAVA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT (RENTAL AGREEMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA M ABUSHI, YOURKIAH J
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (FOR COURT JUDGMENT) AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DEC. OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $66.67 AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA M ABUSHI, YOURKIAH J AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $250.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA M ABUSHI, YOURKIAH J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ON 5/12/09. $12,400.00 RENT, $390.00 COSTS, $2,800.14 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,590.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J.
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (CCP 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA M
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRBAS, MUSA M ABUSHI, YOURKIAH J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVA, F. J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4742 3RD ST. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124-2307, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (AMENDED COURT JUDGMENT FILED 6/1/09)
